message:
refactor(commands): use SshError for deploy_via_scp failures

Replace generic bail! macros with structured SshError::CommandFailed
for deploy operations:

- mkdir remote directory creation failures
- scp binary copy failures
- chmod permission setting failures
- Health check verification failures

Benefits:
- Consistent error handling with host context for debugging
- Typed errors enable better error recovery and retry logic
- Trimmed stderr output removes trailing newlines
- Matches error patterns used elsewhere in the SSH module

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
